Experience SuperSonic Adoption

Sonic SVM is the first chain extension on Solana - for games, applications, and industry’s first TikTok App Layer. Built with Sonic HyperGrid Framework, onboarding the next billion users onto Web3.
JOIN THE ECOSYSTEM

Join
Airdrop 2025 in Base Blockchain

Claim Airdrop
CONTRIBUTE TO NETWORK

STAKE
SONIC

Connect
Our Vision

Unlocking new experiences for both builders, and players

Sonic’s vision is to expand the existing Solana Gaming Ecosystem to process millions of requests per second per game and settle them back onto Solana L1.
HyperGrid

HyperGrid: Solana’s State-of-the-Art Layer 2

HyperGrid is a parallel processing framework designed to introduce customizability and scale, while being natively composable to Solana.
Hypergird Overview

Data Overview

The Sonic Testnet is now live. Explore it through Sonic Odyssey, an exciting incentive campaign for direct testnet interaction and engagement.

Sonic Features

Why choose Sonic?

1

Lightning Speed at Low Cost

Offer the fastest on-chain game experience amongst all gaming L1s, powered by SVM

1

Lightning Speed at Low Cost

Offer the fastest on-chain game experience amongst all gaming L1s, powered by SVM

2

Atomic Interoperability

Execute transactions on Sonic without redeploying your Solana programs & accounts. Benefit directly from Solana Layer1 services and liquidity.

3

Write for EVM, Execute on SVM

Seamlessly deploy dApps from EVM chains to Solana via HyperGrid interpreter.

4

Composable Gaming Primitives & Sandbox Environment

Sonic offers on-chain gaming tools and data types via the ECS framework, allowing developers to use sandbox utilities for building business logic.

5

Monetization Infrastructure

Sonic is natively enabled with growth, traffic, payment & settlement infrastructure for games

2

Atomic Interoperability

Execute transactions on Sonic without redeploying your Solana programs & accounts. Benefit directly from Solana Layer1 services and liquidity.

3

Write for EVM, Execute on SVM

Seamlessly deploy dApps from EVM chains to Solana via HyperGrid interpreter.
‍

4

Composable Gaming Primitives & Sandbox Environment

Sonic exposes native composable gaming primitives and extensible data types based on the ECS framework on-chain. The game engine sandbox utilities to developers while building their business logic on chain.

5

Monetization Infrastructure

Sonic is natively enabled with growth, traffic, payment & settlement infrastructure for games
ECS framework

RUSH  
Onchain Game Development

Rush is a Rust-based ECS framework that streamlines blockchain integration, allowing any game to
become a Fully-Onchain Game or Autonomous World.
Get StartedWatch demo

In-Game Asset Trading

Empower your players to trade, buy, and sell game assets, creating a dynamic in-game economy.

Secure User Authentication

Empower your players to trade, buy, and sell game assets, creating a dynamic in-game economy.

Customizable On-Chain Logic

Easily add custom logic to on-chain operations, giving you flexibility and scalability for your game development needs.

One-Click Deployment

Deploy your on-chain assets and game blueprints quickly with just one click, without worrying about the underlying complexity.

Ecosystem-Friendly Integration

RUSH integrates seamlessly with your favorite tools, engines, and software for effortless use.

ECS framework

RUSH Onchain Game Development

Rush is a Rust-based ECS framework that streamlines blockchain integration, allowing any game to become a Fully-Onchain Game or Autonomous World.
Know More DetailsWatch demo

In-Game Asset
Trading

Empower your players to trade, buy, and sell game assets, creating a dynamic in-game economy.

Secure User
Authentication

Empower your players to trade, buy, and sell game assets, creating a dynamic in-game economy.

Customizable On-Chain
Logic

Easily add custom logic to on-chain operations, giving you flexibility and scalability for your game development needs.

One-Click
Deployment

Deploy your on-chain assets and game blueprints quickly with just one click, without worrying about the underlying complexity.

Ecosystem-Friendly
Integration

RUSH integrates seamlessly with your favorite tools, engines, and software for effortless use.
